codeFiles.go/00_basics:
/// Topic: Variables and Types
name := "KeyZen"
version := 1.0
active := true

fmt.Printf("%s v%.1f (active: %t)\n", name, version, active)

nums := []int{3, 1, 4, 1, 5}
sort.Ints(nums)
fmt.Println(nums)
codeFiles.lua/00_tables:
-- Topic: Tables and Functions
local config = {
    host = "localhost",
    port = 8080,
    debug = true,
}

local function getAddr(cfg)
    return cfg.host .. ":" .. tostring(cfg.port)
end

print(getAddr(config))

local fruits = { "apple", "banana", "cherry" }

for i, fruit in ipairs(fruits) do
    print(i, fruit)
end

for key, val in pairs(config) do
    print(key .. " = " .. tostring(val))
end
codeFiles.lua/01_metatables:
-- Topic: Metatables and OOP
local Animal = {}
Animal.__index = Animal

function Animal.new(name, sound)
    local self = setmetatable({}, Animal)
    self.name = name
    self.sound = sound
    return self
end

function Animal:speak()
    print(self.name .. " says " .. self.sound)
end

local Dog = setmetatable({}, { __index = Animal })
Dog.__index = Dog

function Dog.new(name)
    local self = Animal.new(name, "woof")
    return setmetatable(self, Dog)
end

function Dog:fetch(item)
    print(self.name .. " fetches " .. item)
end

local rex = Dog.new("Rex")
rex:speak()
rex:fetch("ball")
codeFiles.lua/02_file_io:
-- Topic: String and File I/O
local function readLines(path)
    local lines = {}
    local file = io.open(path, "r")
    if not file then
        return nil, "cannot open " .. path
    end
    for line in file:lines() do
        lines[#lines + 1] = line
    end
    file:close()
    return lines
end

local data, err = readLines("input.txt")
if not data then
    print("Error: " .. err)
    os.exit(1)
end

for _, line in ipairs(data) do
    local word = string.match(line, "^(%S+)")
    if word then
        print(string.format("-> %s", word))
    end
end
codeFiles.lua/03_coroutines:
-- Topic: Coroutines
local function producer()
    return coroutine.wrap(function()
        for i = 1, 5 do
            coroutine.yield("item_" .. i)
        end
    end)
end

local next = producer()
for val in next do
    print(val)
end
codeFiles.shell/01_conditionals:
# Topic: Conditionals and Arguments
if [ -z "$1" ]; then
    echo "usage: $0 <name>"
    exit 1
fi

name="$1"
count="${2:-5}"

if [ "$count" -gt 10 ]; then
    echo "too many, max 10"
    exit 1
fi

for i in $(seq 1 "$count"); do
    echo "$i: hello $name"
done
codeFiles.shell/02_loops:
# Topic: Loops and File Processing
for file in *.txt; do
    lines=$(wc -l < "$file")
    echo "$file: $lines lines"
done

while read -r line; do
    key=$(echo "$line" | cut -d= -f1)
    val=$(echo "$line" | cut -d= -f2)
    export "$key=$val"
done < config.env

find . -name '*.log' -mtime +7 \
    -exec rm -f {} \;
echo "cleaned old logs"
codeFiles.shell/03_docker_git:
# Topic: Docker and Git
docker build -t myapp:latest .
docker run -d \
    -p 8080:8080 \
    -v ./data:/app/data \
    --name myapp \
    myapp:latest

git add -A
git commit -m "deploy: update config"
git push origin main
git tag -a v1.0.0 -m "release"
git push --tags
codeFiles.shell/04_text:
# Topic: Text Processing
grep -rn "TODO" --include="*.go" . | while read -r match; do
    file=$(echo "$match" | cut -d: -f1)
    line=$(echo "$match" | cut -d: -f2)
    echo "[$file:$line] $(echo "$match" | cut -d: -f3-)"
done

wc -l *.go | sort -rn | head -5
